title: Sweep the Trail
description: A cheerful real-world sweeping coach that guides crumbs or leaves into a marked landing zone, then finishes with the dustpan.
learningGoals: Use large strokes and small corner strokes deliberately
Build thorough rather than hurried work habits
Care for indoor and outdoor shared spaces
interactionModel: tap the large done row after each real-world sweeping step; timed steps support steady edge and corner work
feedbackModel: cheerful trail-ranger voice with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; crumbs and leaves become treasure instead of a chore

modes.title: Crumb Patrol
modes.skill: thorough indoor sweeping and dustpan use

modes.title: Leaf Trail
modes.skill: whole-arm outdoor sweeping and path care

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
